title: SNDL Third Quarter 2024 Earnings: Revenues Beat Expectations, EPS Lags
text: The cannabis company demonstrated mixed earnings results. Revenue reached CA$236.9 million, matching the prior year's performance and exceeding analyst projections by 2.2%. However, earnings per share fell short, with the company reporting a CA$0.07 loss per share—a 40% miss versus expectations. On the profitability front, the company narrowed its net loss to CA$19.3 million, representing an 11% improvement from the same quarter last year. Looking forward, analysts project the company will achieve revenue growth of 6.1% annually over three years, which trails the broader pharmaceutical industry's anticipated 10% expansion rate. The stock responded positively to the announcement, rising 7.7% over the preceding week. Simply Wall St noted 1 warning sign for SNDL that investors should monitor.
